panels.name: Current QPS
panels.description: Query times of SQL statements (including storage procedures) per second

panels.name: Current TPS
panels.description: Execution times of submitted and rollback transactions per second

panels.name: iops
panels.description: Average number of I/O requests processed by the system in a specified period

panels.name: Total Connections
panels.description: Total number of connections that attempt to connect to the MySQL server

panels.name: Buffer Pool Usage
panels.description: Ratio of idle pages to the total number of buffer pool pages in the InnoDB buffer

panels.name: Buffer Pool Hit
panels.description: Ratio of idle pages to the total number of buffer pool pages in the InnoDB buffer

panels.name: Network Input Throughput
panels.description: Incoming traffic in bytes per second

panels.name: Network Output Throughput
panels.description: Outgoing traffic in bytes per second

panels.name: SELECT Statements per Second
panels.description: Number of SELECT statements executed per second

panels.name: INSERT Statements per Second
panels.description: Number of INSERT statements executed per second

panels.name: UPDATE Statements per Second
panels.description: Number of UPDATE statements executed per second

panels.name: DELETE Statements per Second
panels.description: Number of DELETE statements executed per second
